clean-repo-references.description: All repository references point to the correct pragnition org repo

rapid-root-removal.signature: All skill preambles without RAPID_ROOT computation
rapid-root-removal.description: RAPID_ROOT references removed from all 26 skill preambles and any source files

no-broken-preambles.description: Every skill SKILL.md preamble still correctly loads RAPID_TOOLS from .env and validates its presence

no-fishjojo1-references.description: No file in the codebase references fishjojo1/RAPID as a clone or installation URL

definition.scope: Corrects the clone URL from fishjojo1 to pragnition across documentation files, and sweeps/removes all unused RAPID_ROOT references from every skill preamble and source file in the codebase.

tasks.description: Replace fishjojo1/RAPID with pragnition/RAPID in DOCS.md and README.md
tasks.acceptance: No fishjojo1 references remain in any .md file

tasks.description: Remove RAPID_ROOT computation from all 26 skill preambles
tasks.acceptance: grep -r RAPID_ROOT skills/ returns zero matches
grep -r RAPID_ROOT src/ returns zero matches

acceptance: Zero fishjojo1 references in codebase (excluding git history and archives)
Zero RAPID_ROOT references in skills/ and src/ directories
All skill preambles still correctly load and validate RAPID_TOOLS
